kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/setup/admin path_url=/api/v1/setup/admin headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '80', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Admin User", "email": "admin_77038@email.com", "password": "admin123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/movies path_url=/api/v1/movies headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5ZDZlNzc4ZGRjYjU5N2I0YmI3YTI3ZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTY5MTY0MCwiZXhwIjoxNzc1Nzc4MDQwfQ.INv0t1X-tNQzfzfUZjdT3k5Zox6YSKoskOcOgXmUG1g', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '210'} body=b'{"title": "Filme Reserva", "synopsis": "Fluxo completo teste", "director": "Diretor Teste", "genres": ["Drama"], "duration": "120", "classification": "PG-13", "poster": "teste.jpg", "releaseDate": "2026-04-08"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/reservations path_url=/api/v1/reservations headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5ZDZlNzc4ZGRjYjU5N2I0YmI3YTI4ZCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTY5MTY0MCwiZXhwIjoxNzc1Nzc4MDQwfQ.gPMMvFyDVnbjaZHA5yuwiOpMvpLpJD8lLMRpu-DUOrY', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '125'} body=b'{"session": "69d6e778ddcb597b4bb7a28a", "seats": [{"row": "A", "number": 4, "type": "full"}], "paymentMethod": "credit_card"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
